blocks.text: 35 years ago, a light entered this world-one that was destined to bring warmth, grace, and an unforgettable kind of brilliance to everyone fortunate enough to cross its path.

Long before you became my partner or Nitvika’s mother, you were already your own fierce, beautiful soul. Your laughter, your wisdom, and the quiet strength you carry into every room have always set you apart.

Some birthday gifts fade with time. Flowers wilt, chocolates disappear, and everyday tokens get tucked away in drawers. But on your 35th revolution around the sun, I wanted to give you something that would always be waiting whenever you look up.

So today, I dedicate Regulus-the bright, beating heart of Leo-to you. A light that has travelled seventy-nine years across space just to reach us, mirroring the steady, enduring warmth you bring into our lives every single day.

Whenever life feels busy or overwhelming, just look up at the night sky. Let that shining light remind you of the extraordinary woman you are, how deeply you are cherished, and how my heart will always find its way back to yours.
Light that has already travelled seventy-nine years to reach us isn't going anywhere. It doesn't wilt, or fade, or lose its shimmer with time.
35 years of your story, and every chapter since has been watched over by a sky that was always waiting to celebrate you.

blocks.title: 1991 · The Original Light
blocks.description: 35 orbits ago, Shivanjali's journey began-bringing warmth, grace, and effortless brilliance into the world.

blocks.title: Her Own Trail
blocks.description: Building her own wisdom, her distinct laughter, her fierce soul, and the quiet strength she carries into every room.

blocks.title: Two Orbits Align
blocks.description: When two separate constellations crossed paths and linked forever-making my world infinitely brighter.

blocks.title: Our Little Light
blocks.description: Watching her step into motherhood with boundless love, filling our home with warmth and raising our little light.

blocks.title: 35th Orbit · Regulus
blocks.description: 35 revolutions around the sun. A star in the heart of Leo dedicated to an extraordinary woman forever.

blocks.text: Whenever life feels overwhelming... look up. Somewhere in the heart of Leo, there is a light I've chosen to remind me of you.
